justification: The question concerns the future stock price of a specific publicly traded company (Parker-Hannifin) on a major stock exchange.
question:
Will PH's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2026-04-12?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
